assertions.assertion: Mentions DefaultClockSkew as the relevant setting
assertions.rationale: Does not mention DefaultClockSkew by name; refers to a generic 'clock skew setting'.
Does not show options.Saml.DefaultClockSkew. Shows JWT bearer ClockSkew instead.

assertions.assertion: Suggests increasing the value beyond the default 5 minutes
Does NOT suggest changes to the OIDC/OAuth configuration — this is SAML-specific
assertions.rationale: Suggests JWT bearer TokenValidationParameters.ClockSkew which is OIDC/OAuth, not SAML.
